text:
NAME: — 

LONG NAME: PRE_ICL_TIER_DRUG_TYPE 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: Binary character string where each digit is a 1 or 0 to accommodate a variety of types of drugs. For 
example, if the value = 000011 (1s in the 1st and 2nd digits), then generic and non-preferred brand 
drugs are covered on this tier during the pre-ICL phase. 

 1 in 1st digit = Non-Preferred Brand 
 1 in 2nd digit = Generic 
 1 in 3rd digit = Preferred Generic 
 1 in 4th digit =
